Meet David

A local web geek who sweats the pixels.

Passionate about pixel-perfect design, cutting-edge tooling, and thinking about the road ahead — I strive for excellence in every project I take on.

My background spans marketing, engineering, and big-data visualization for some of the largest companies in healthcare and tech.

Work with me

What I do

Four ways I can help your next build.

Web Development

JavaScript, React, and Node — highly-customized, advanced applications for the modern web, built to last and easy to maintain.

ReactNodeTypeScriptAPIs

Disaster Recovery

Recover information and get your app back online after a hack — plus guidance to lock it down for next time.

Version Control

Cloud-backed code with clean restore points and a documented history of every change.

Custom Development

Software dashboards, big-data management, and customer insights — enterprise experience brought to your next project.

github Feb 28, 2024 3 min read

Getting Started with GitHub Actions

GitHub Actions automates software workflows directly in your repository. You can run tests, build artifacts, deploy apps, and handle repetitive tasks whenever events happen in GitHub.
